Home RSVP Wedding Party Directions FAQs

Directions

How to get to the party

Ceremony - 4pm

Prelude Concert - 3:30pm

First Church in Marlborough

37 High St
Marlborough, MA 01752

Parking at First Church

Please park in the lot at the rear of the church. The entrance can be found on Bolton St.

Reception - 5pm

Sanctuary

82 Main St
Maynard, MA 01754

Parking at Sanctuary

Free parking can be found in lots on Walnut St., River St., and off of Main St. There is no parking next to the actual venue, so please plan to park in one of these lots. Click on the sidebar in the map above to see a list of the lots (marked in blue). All lots are within walking distance of the venue.
